LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, FEB-04-2021 HEARING HELD ON PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION FOR PRELIMIARY INJUNCTION. THE COURT INSTRUCTS EACH SIDE TO SUBMIT COMPETING DRAFT ORDERS OR STATEMENT OF DECISION IN WORD FORMAT BY EMAIL SENT TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG BY THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS ON 2/9/21. THE COURT INSTRUCTS THE PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO THE FOUR MOTIONS TO SEAL. BY THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS ON 2/9/21, THE PARTIES ARE TO EMAIL TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG FOUR STIPULATED PROPOSED ORDERS IF THE PARTIES ARE ABLE TO REACH AGREEMENTS ON ALL FOUR MOTIONS, OR A LETTER BRIEF AND COMPETING PROPOSED ORDERS IF THE PARTIES ARE NOT ABLE TO REACH AN AGREEMENT ON A PARTICULAR MOTION. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-28-2021 Off Calendar

MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Portions Of DefendantS Opposition To PlaintiffS Ex Parte Application For Order To Show Cause And Temporary Restraining Order And Documents Attached In Support Of DefendantS Demurrer
Off Calendar Feb-23-2021 Off Calendar

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-11-2021 Off Calendar

Specially Set Hearing On Expedited Prelimiary Injunction
Off Calendar Feb-10-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Attys. MERYL MACKLIN, Esq. (Tel: 415-675-3400) and ANNE REDCROSS BEEHLER, Esq. (Tel: 949-223-7000) of Bryan Cave Leighton Paisner LLP for Plaintiff RE FormsNet LLC;
Attys. MATTHEW M. WERDEGAR, Esq., MAILE YEATS-ROWE, Esq., and RYAN HAYWARD, Esq. of Keker, Van Nest & Peters LLP (Tel: 415-391-5400) for Defendant Glide Labs, Inc.

Hearing on Plaintiff's Application for Prelimiary Injunction.

Matter argued by counsel for both sides.

The Court instructs each side to submit competing draft orders or statement of decision in Word format by email sent to contestdept302tr@sftc.org by the close of business on 2/9/21.

The Court instructs the parties to meet and confer as to the four motions to seal. By the close of business on 2/9/21, the parties are to email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org four stipulated proposed orders if the parties are able to reach agreements on all four motions, or a letter brief and competing proposed orders if the parties are not able to reach an agreement on a particular motion.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
